name: Johnny Depp

acts.description: UK High Court found he had assaulted Amber Heard on multiple occasions; US jury found Heard defamed him

behavior_summary: UK court ruled he was a domestic abuser (of at least 12 incidents). US jury found Heard had defamed him. Both findings can be true simultaneously. Relationship appeared mutually toxic and violent.

notable_works: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
art.summary: Character actor who became one of the biggest stars in the world. Range is real; so are the legal findings.

verdict.blurb: A UK court found he abused her. A US jury found she defamed him. The internet chose a side before either verdict and hasn't reconsidered. Maybe sit with the complexity for once.
